xpath.attribute: '1' if (combination_info.get('prevent_zero_price_sale') or das_lms_hide_add_to_cart or das_lms_shop_enrolled or product._das_lms_is_enrolled_in_course() or product._das_lms_fallback_hide_shop_cart() or product._das_lms_course_sale_blocked()) else ''

div.class: alert alert-warning border border-warning-subtle shadow-sm mb-3 py-3 px-3 rounded d-flex align-items-start o_das_lms_product_academic_notice

i.class: fa fa-exclamation-triangle fa-lg text-warning me-2 mt-1 flex-shrink-0

div.t-if: not product._das_lms_course_sale_blocked() and product._das_lms_course_sale_notice_html() and not (das_lms_shop_enrolled or product._das_lms_is_enrolled_in_course())
div.class: alert alert-info border border-info-subtle shadow-sm mb-3 py-3 px-3 rounded d-flex align-items-start o_das_lms_product_academic_notice

i.class: fa fa-info-circle fa-lg text-info me-2 mt-1 flex-shrink-0

xpath.attribute: {{'d-none' if combination_info.get('prevent_zero_price_sale') or das_lms_hide_add_to_cart or das_lms_shop_enrolled or product._das_lms_is_enrolled_in_course() or product._das_lms_fallback_hide_shop_cart() or product._das_lms_course_sale_blocked() else 'd-inline-flex'}} align-items-center mb-2 me-auto
product_price mt-2 mb-3 {{'d-none' if combination_info.get('prevent_zero_price_sale') or product._das_lms_is_enrolled_in_course() else 'd-inline-block'}}

css_quantity input-group {{'d-none' if combination_info.get('prevent_zero_price_sale') or das_lms_hide_add_to_cart or das_lms_shop_enrolled or product._das_lms_is_enrolled_in_course() or product._das_lms_fallback_hide_shop_cart() or product._das_lms_course_sale_blocked() else 'd-inline-flex'}} me-2 mb-2 align-middle
